---
title: ""
---

<div class="project-card">

## AI Governance Document Classification

This project built a machine learning pipeline to automatically classify AI governance documents into key domains such as bias, privacy, and safety.

The goal was to reduce manual review time and create a scalable way to organize large volumes of policy and regulatory documents.

**Tools:** Python, Pandas, NLP, Sentence Transformers

<a class="button" href="https://github.com/sarambaji/ai-governance-classification">View Project</a>

</div>
